minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-052 Work Packet Full-Detail Authority and Microtask Source Plan: ensure the activated work packet itself carries full implementation detail while also containing a structured MT source plan. Acceptance: a no-context strong model can execute from the work packet alone
the same packet can regenerate MT contracts/files without relying on manually maintained sidecars or hidden chat context.
scope.risk_if_missed: MT-052 scope is lost and Kernel002 can reintroduce drift or direct mutation.
scope.summary: MT-052 Work Packet Full-Detail Authority and Microtask Source Plan: ensure the activated work packet itself carries full implementation detail while also containing a structured MT source plan. Acceptance: a no-context strong model can execute from the work packet alone; the same packet can regenerate MT contracts/files without relying on manually maintained sidecars or hidden chat context.
